ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the state */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total number of cured cases in the state */,
  "total_active" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases in the state */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the state */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the district belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the district */,
  "total_cured" INTEGER /* Total number of cured cases in the district */,
  "total_active" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases in the district */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the district */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the case was reported */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., Active, Cured, Deceased) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_tracing" TEXT /* Information on contact tracing (e.g., Yes, No, Unknown) */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the patient (e.g., Not Vaccinated, Partially Vaccinated, Fully Vaccinated) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* List of symptoms experienced by the patient */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient was hospitalized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, AstraZeneca) */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any side effects experienced by the patient (e.g., None, Mild, Severe) */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare worker who administered the vaccine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for full vaccination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., Hospital Beds, Ventilators) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the resource is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_resources_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Healthcare Worker, Public Health Official) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., View Cases, Edit Vaccination Records) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
